name: Chicken Chop Suey
recipeInstructions:
1. Pan fry chicken in oil until cooked through. Remove from heat and set aside.
2. Crush bouillon cubes and dissolve in pineapple juice.
3. Add soy sauce, ginger, horseradish, celery, and green pepper to the pan with the dissolved bouillon. Heat through.
4. Combine the chicken with tomato, green onions, pea pods, and water chestnuts. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
5. Pour over fresh bean sprouts and serve immediately.
